title: RFP Hub Opportunity
description: RFP Hub Standard v1.0.0 — a canonical, ecosystem-neutral representation of an Ethereum-ecosystem funding opportunity. Covers six opportunity types: grant, hackathon, bounty, accelerator, vc_fund, rfp. Released as CC0 1.0. Aligns conceptually with DAOIP-5 (Grants Metadata) and schema.org/Grant. See FIELDS.md for the full field reference.

specVersion.description: The RFP Hub Standard version this entry conforms to. Fixed at 1.0.0 for this schema. Consumers use it to select the correct validator.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier for the opportunity within the Hub. Immutable once assigned. A namespaced form (e.g. 'filecoin:propgf-batch-3') is recommended but not required.

type.description: The kind of funding opportunity. Every entry carries a type-specific object under a key EQUAL to this value (type 'hackathon' → a 'hackathon' object, 'vc_fund' → a 'vc_fund' object), so consumers can always read `opportunity[opportunity.type]`. The matching block is required for all six types (see allOf); for grants it may be an empty object.

description.description: Full description of the opportunity. Markdown is permitted; consumers should treat it as untrusted and sanitise before rendering.

summary.description: Optional short teaser (≈1–2 sentences) for list/card views.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the opportunity. 'upcoming' = announced but not yet accepting applications; 'open' = currently accepting; 'closed' = deadline passed or no longer accepting (auto-set when closesAt passes); 'archived' = withdrawn or retired. Editorial/review state (pending, rejected) is NOT represented here — it is server-side metadata.

organization.description: The organisation issuing or hosting the opportunity.

source.description: Provenance of this entry, including the canonical source URL and verification status. Required so every entry is traceable to an original posting.

ecosystems.description: Ethereum-family ecosystems this opportunity targets. The RFP Hub is ETH-scoped (per DEV-437), but this is an open, extensible list — NOT a closed enum — so L2s and ETH-adjacent ecosystems are first-class. Examples (non-normative): 'Ethereum', 'Optimism', 'Base', 'Arbitrum', 'Polygon', 'Scroll', 'zkSync', 'Linea', 'OP Stack', 'Celo'.

networks.description: Specific networks/chains the funding is denominated on or deployed to (e.g. 'optimism', 'base', 'ethereum-mainnet'). Free-text; not constrained to a closed set in v1.0.0.

categories.description: Topical categories (e.g. 'DeFi', 'Public Goods', 'Infrastructure', 'Developer Tooling'). Free-text in v1.0.0.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and faceting.

applicationUrl.description: URL where applicants submit or apply.

website.description: Primary website for the opportunity or program.

logoUrl.description: URL of the program/organisation logo image.

funding.description: Funding envelope for the opportunity (award sizes, total budget, currency).

closesAt.description: RFC 3339 application deadline. When this passes, status should transition to 'closed'.

postedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the opportunity was first publicly announced at the source.

createdAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this entry was created in the Hub.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this entry was last modified in the Hub.

grant.description: Grant-specific fields. Present (possibly an empty object) when type is 'grant'.

hackathon.description: Hackathon-specific fields. Present when type is 'hackathon'.

bounty.description: Bounty-specific fields. Present when type is 'bounty'.

accelerator.description: Accelerator-specific fields. Present when type is 'accelerator'.

vc_fund.description: VC-fund-specific fields. Present when type is 'vc_fund'.

rfp.description: RFP-specific fields. Present when type is 'rfp'.

extensions.description: Namespace for publisher- or integrator-specific data not covered by the standard. Keys SHOULD be namespaced (e.g. 'mysource.internalId'). Contents are not validated by this schema.

grant.title: Grant details
grant.description: Grant-specific attributes not covered by the core fields. May be an empty object ({}) — core funding and date fields live at the top level.

fundingMechanism.description: How funds are allocated (e.g. retroactive public goods, proactive application, streaming, quadratic).

milestoneBased.description: Whether disbursement is tied to milestones.

recurring.description: Whether the program runs in recurring rounds/seasons.

amount.description: Amount in major units of the currency (e.g. 2000000 = 2,000,000 USD).

currency.description: ISO 4217 fiat code (USD, EUR) or a token symbol (ETH, OP, USDC).

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: The organisation issuing/hosting the opportunity (the funder). Embedded on an opportunity as a descriptive summary; the same shape is the standalone Organization directory record. NOTE: verification status is NOT here — verification belongs to the publishing relationship (a user permissioned on a verified org), not to the issuer.

slug.description: Lowercase URL-safe identifier; also the organisation's namespace.

ecosystems.description: Ethereum-family ecosystems the organisation operates in.

url.description: Canonical URL of the original posting at the source. Anti-spam and verification jobs fetch this.

publisher.description: Namespace (organisation slug) this entry was published under (e.g. 'filecoin'). T2 auto-approval requires the publishing account to be a member of this verified org. May differ from the issuing organization.

submittedBy.description: Who submitted or published this entry — a public handle, organisation slug, or 'community' for anonymous community submissions. The internal account identity is never exposed.

ingestedVia.description: How this entry entered the Hub. 'outbox' = a one-way push from an upstream source system's outbox; 'import' = a backfill/seed import.

originalId.description: Identifier of this opportunity in the source system.

verifiedAgainstSource.description: Whether the entry's fields were verified against the source URL by the verification-assist job. null = not yet checked.

verifiedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the last source verification.

snapshotUrl.description: IPFS or archived snapshot of the source at verification time.

currency.description: ISO 4217 code or token symbol for the amounts below.

minAward.description: Minimum individual award in major units.

maxAward.description: Maximum individual award in major units.

totalBudget.description: Total program budget in major units.

amountDistributed.description: Amount distributed to date in major units.

awardsToDate.description: Number of awards/grants made to date.

track.description: Track this prize belongs to, if tracked.

location.description: Physical location, or null for fully online.

online.description: Whether the event is (also) held online.

equity.description: Equity taken, expressed as a string (e.g. '5%', 'none').

stages.description: Investment stages the fund participates in.

issuingOrganization.description: Organisation issuing the RFP, if distinct from organization.name.
